headline: Ford stock drops, but GM, Stellantis up for week ending March 27
summary: GM and Jeep-parent Stellantis saw their stock prices increase, while Ford's fell for the week ending March 27.

raw.headline: Ford stock drops, but GM, Stellantis up for week ending March 27
raw.summary: GM and Jeep-parent Stellantis saw their stock prices increase, while Ford's fell for the week ending March 27.

headline: Gene Munster Says Upcoming Tesla Deliveries Will Be 'First Good Read,' As Ford, GM Scale Back EV Ambitions— Here's Why
summary: On Friday, Gene Munster says Tesla's upcoming delivery report could signal a turning point for EV demand and market share.

raw.headline: Gene Munster Says Upcoming Tesla Deliveries Will Be 'First Good Read,' As Ford, GM Scale Back EV Ambitions— Here's Why
